name: HR_ORG_CLASSIFICATIONS_VL
query: SELECT oc.CLASSIFICATION_CODE, oct.CLASSIFICATION_NAME, oc.MODULE_ID, oct.DESCRIPTION, oc.BUSINESS_GROUP_ID, oc.LEGISLATION_CODE, oc.SET_ENABLED_FLAG, oc.ENABLED_FLAG, oc.INFORMATION_CATEGORY, oc.INFORMATION1, oc.INFORMATION2, oc.INFORMATION3, oc.INFORMATION4, oc.INFORMATION5, oc.INFORMATION6, oc.INFORMATION7, oc.INFORMATION8, oc.INFORMATION9, oc.INFORMATION10, oc.INFORMATION11, oc.INFORMATION12, oc.INFORMATION13, oc.INFORMATION14, oc.INFORMATION15, oc.INFORMATION16, oc.INFORMATION17, oc.INFORMATION18, oc.INFORMATION19, oc.INFORMATION20, oc.INFORMATION21, oc.INFORMATION22, oc.INFORMATION23, oc.INFORMATION24, oc.INFORMATION25, oc.INFORMATION26, oc.INFORMATION27, oc.INFORMATION28, oc.INFORMATION29, oc.INFORMATION30, oc.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, oc.CREATED_BY, oc.CREATION_DATE, oc.LAST_UPDATED_BY, oc.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, oc.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, oc.ALLOW_IN_SELECT_ORG_CLASS_YN, oc.AGGREGATE_FLAG FROM HR_ORG_CLASSIFICATIONS oc, HR_ORG_CLASSIFICATIONS_TL oct WHERE oc.CLASSIFICATION_CODE = oct.CLASSIFICATION_CODE AND oct.LANGUAGE = SYS_CONTEXT('USERENV', 'LANG')
